description: Court record about a debt. Location: Alexandria. Dated: Tuesday, 6 Iyyar 4836 AM = 12 April 1076 CE. Yefet b. Yeshuʿa b. Qasāsa ha-Kohen declares that he owes 14 dinars to Yefet b. Khalaf Ibn ʿAwkal and will repay the debt in monthly installments of 1 dinar. It seems like he commits not to use a different deed that was approved in a Muslim court. Witnesses: Yaʿaqov b. Yosef; ʿUlla b. Avraham ha-Levi; Yaʿaqov b. Aharon; ʿEzra b. Mevasser. The validation is signed by the cantor Mawhūb b. Aharon the cantor. (Information in part from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #844 and Goitein's index card.) VMR
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
